questions.question: Nail ka main protective layer konsa hota hai?
questions.explanation: Nail plate ek hard keratin structure hota hai jo poore nail ko protect karta hai aur visible part hota hai.

questions.question: Nail matrix kya kaam karta hai?
questions.explanation: Nail matrix nail growth ke liye responsible hota hai aur naye keratin cells produce karta hai.

questions.question: Healthy nail ka color kaisa hona chahiye?
questions.explanation: Healthy nail pale pink hota hai nail bed ke kaaran aur white tips free edge ka natural color hota hai.

questions.question: Cuticle ke liye best practice kya hai?

options.B: Push back karna chahiye aur moisturize karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Cuticle ko gently push back karna chahiye kyunki ye protective barrier hota hai. Cutting se infections ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Nail infection ke liye sabse common cause kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Excessive moisture aur humidity fungal aur bacterial infections ke liye ideal environment banate hain.

questions.question: Nail technician ko sterilization ke liye sabse important tool kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Autoclave high temperature aur pressure se metal tools ko completely sterilize karta hai jo bacteria aur viruses ko kill karta hai.

questions.question: Nail extension ke baad nail ko kitna time rest dena chahiye?

options.B: Har 8 weeks ke baad 2 weeks break
options.C: Har 6 weeks ke baad 1 week break

questions.explanation: Har 8 weeks ke baad 2 weeks break dena chahiye taaki natural nail ko recover karne ka time mile aur healthy rahe.

questions.question: Nail ke different zones mein se sabse sensitive zone kaunsa hota hai?
questions.explanation: Nail matrix sabse sensitive aur important zone hota hai kyunki ye nail growth control karta hai aur damage se nail problems ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Onychomycosis kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Onychomycosis ek fungal infection hota hai jo nails ko thick, discolored aur brittle banata hai.

questions.question: Nail technician ko kaun si precaution leni chahiye jab client ko infection ho?

options.B: Service refuse karna chahiye aur doctor ko suggest karna chahiye
options.C: Extra sterilization se service dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Infection ke case mein service refuse karna chahiye taaki infection spread na ho aur client ko doctor ke paas jaane ke liye suggest karna chahiye.

questions.question: Nail growth rate normally kitna hota hai?
questions.explanation: Average nail growth rate 3mm per week hota hai jo age, health aur nutrition par depend karta hai.

questions.question: Brittle nails ke liye sabse common reason kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Brittle nails ke multiple reasons ho sakte hain jaise excessive water, lack of moisture, aur chemical exposure.

questions.question: Nail ke white spots ko kya kahte hain?
questions.explanation: Leukonychia white spots hote hain jo usually minor trauma se hote hain aur generally harmless hote hain.

questions.question: Hand hygiene ke liye best practice kya hai?

options.B: Har client se pehle aur baad mein hath dhona

questions.explanation: Har client se pehle aur baad mein hath dhona aur sanitize karna cross-contamination se bachne ke liye zaroori hota hai.

questions.question: Nail ke pH level ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Nail ka pH slightly acidic hota hai (4.5-5.5) jo protective barrier maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Nail extension ke baad nail plate ko damage se kaise bachaya ja sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Proper technique, regular moisturizing aur periodic breaks sabhi nail health maintain karne mein important hote hain.

questions.question: Vertical ridges in nails ko kya kehte hain aur ye normal hote hain?

options.A: Abnormal aur infection ka sign hota hai

questions.explanation: Vertical ridges normal aging process hote hain aur zyada tension ki baat nahi hoti, lekin horizontal ridges concern ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Nail preparation ke pehle sabse pehla step kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Hands ko sanitize karna sabse pehla aur most important step hota hai taaki bacteria aur germs se bachav ho.

questions.question: Nail shape ko determine karne ke liye konsa factor important hota hai?
questions.explanation: Nail shape decide karte waqt client preference, hand shape, aur lifestyle sabhi factors consider karne chahiye.

questions.question: Nail file karte waqt konsa direction use karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: One direction mein file karna chahiye kyunki back and forth motion se nail splitting ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Cuticle removal ke liye best tool kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Cuticle pusher specially designed hota hai cuticle ko safely push back karne ke liye.

questions.question: Nail preparation ke liye water temperature kaisa hona chahiye?
questions.explanation: Lukewarm water sabse best hota hai kyunki ye comfortable hota hai aur nail ko soften karta hai preparation ke liye.

questions.question: Nail dehydration ko kaise prevent kiya ja sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Nail dehydration prevent karne ke liye moisturizing, cuticle oil, aur proper hydration sabhi important hote hain.

questions.question: Nail polish ko remove karte waqt konsa chemical use karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Acetone-free remover nail ko less damage karta hai kyunki acetone nail ko dry aur brittle banata hai.

questions.question: Nail preparation ke baad surface ko kya apply karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Base coat apply karna chahiye jo nail ko protect karta hai aur polish ko better adhesion deta hai.

questions.question: Nail buffer ka main purpose kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Buffer nail ko smooth karta hai, shine deta hai, aur ridges ko minimize karta hai.

questions.question: Nail preparation mein 'dehydration step' kya hota hai?

options.B: Nail surface se moisture remove karna

questions.explanation: Dehydration step mein nail surface se moisture remove kiya jata hai taaki extension better adhere ho.

questions.question: Nail preparation ke liye ideal time period kitna hota hai?
questions.explanation: 10-15 minutes proper preparation ke liye sufficient hota hai jo thorough aur quick dono hota hai.

questions.question: Nail ke free edge ko prepare karte waqt kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Slightly file karna aur sanitize karna

questions.explanation: Free edge ko slightly file karke sanitize karna chahiye taaki clean appearance ho aur extension properly adhere ho.

questions.question: Nail ke around skin ko prepare karte waqt kya precaution leni chahiye?
questions.explanation: Surrounding skin ko gently clean aur moisturize karna chahiye taaki irritation na ho aur professional look rahe.

questions.question: Nail preparation ke baad nail ko kaise check kiya ja sakta hai ki ready hai?
questions.explanation: Proper preparation check karne ke liye visual, texture, aur moisture level sabhi aspects check karne chahiye.

questions.question: Nail preparation ke liye kaun se tools essential hote hain?
questions.explanation: Complete nail preparation ke liye sabhi tools important hote hain - file, buffer, cuticle tools, sanitizer, aur moisturizer.

questions.question: Nail ke 'onycholysis' ko kaise prevent kiya ja sakta hai preparation ke through?
questions.explanation: Onycholysis (nail separation) prevent karne ke liye proper technique, gentle handling, aur correct preparation sabhi important hote hain.

questions.question: Nail preparation ke baad client ko kya instruction dena chahiye?
questions.explanation: Client ko pani, chemicals se avoid karne aur regular moisturizing ke liye instruct karna chahiye taaki nails healthy rahe.

questions.question: Acrylic nails ke liye main components kya hote hain?
questions.explanation: Acrylic nails powder aur liquid (monomer) ke mixture se banate hain jo polymerization process se hard hota hai.

questions.question: Gel nails kya hote hain?

options.B: UV light se cure hone wale polish

questions.explanation: Gel nails UV/LED light se cure hote hain aur acrylic se zyada flexible aur natural look dete hain.

questions.question: Nail extension apply karte waqt sabse important skill kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Proper sizing aur fit sabse important hota hai kyunki wrong size uncomfortable aur damaging ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Nail tips ke sizes kaun kaun se hote hain?
questions.explanation: Nail tips usually 0-10 numbered sizes mein available hote hain jo different nail widths ke liye hote hain.

questions.question: Acrylic liquid (monomer) kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Acrylic liquid mainly MMA (Methyl methacrylate) ya EMA (Ethyl methacrylate) hota hai jo powder ke saath react karta hai.

questions.question: Gel polish ke advantages kya hote hain?
questions.explanation: Gel polish long lasting, odorless, aur natural appearance deta hai jo acrylic se better hota hai.

questions.question: Nail extension ke liye best adhesive kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Cyanoacrylate based nail glue specially designed hota hai nail tips ke liye strong aur safe adhesion ke liye.

questions.question: Dip powder nails ke liye kya required hota hai?
questions.explanation: Dip powder nails ke liye liquid base coat aur colored powder use hota hai jo chemical reaction se hard hota hai.

questions.question: Nail extension ko remove karte waqt sabse safe method kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Acetone soak sabse safe method hota hai jo extension ko gently soften karta hai aur natural nail ko damage se bachata hai.

questions.question: Fiberglass nails kya hote hain?
questions.explanation: Fiberglass nails silk material ko wrap karke resin se seal kiya jata hai jo lightweight aur flexible hote hain.

questions.question: Nail extension ko maintain karne ke liye fill-in interval kitna hona chahiye?
questions.explanation: 3-4 weeks ka interval ideal hota hai kyunki natural nail growth ke saath extension maintain karna padta hai.

questions.question: Acrylic powder aur liquid ke ratio kya hona chahiye?
questions.explanation: Ideal ratio 2:1 powder to liquid hota hai jo perfect consistency aur strength deta hai.

questions.question: Gel extension ke liye curing time kitna hona chahiye?
questions.explanation: Gel extension typically 1-2 minutes UV/LED light mein cure hota hai depending on light strength.

questions.question: Nail extension material choose karte waqt kya factors important hote hain?
questions.explanation: Material selection mein client preference, nail health, budget, aur durability requirement sabhi important hote hain.

questions.question: Acrylic monomer ke fumes se kya risk hota hai?
questions.explanation: Acrylic monomer fumes respiratory, skin, aur eye irritation cause kar sakte hain isliye proper ventilation zaroori hota hai.

questions.question: Nail extension ko refill karte waqt kya procedure follow karna chahiye?

options.B: Pehle old extension remove karna phir naya apply karna
options.C: Regrowth area ko fill karna aur shape maintain karna

questions.explanation: Refill mein regrowth area ko fill karke shape aur length maintain kiya jata hai puri extension remove kiye bina.

questions.question: Nail extension ke liye kaun sa material sabse natural look deta hai?
questions.explanation: Gel extension sabse natural look deta hai kyunki ye flexible hota hai aur thin layer mein apply ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Nail art ke liye basic design tools kaun kaun se hote hain?
questions.explanation: Nail art ke liye brushes, dotting tools, stamping tools, rhinestones, foil etc. sabhi important hote hain.

questions.question: Nail stamping technique kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Stamping mein special plates se intricate patterns ko quickly aur accurately transfer kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Dotting tool ka main use kya hota hai?

options.B: Dots aur small circles banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Dotting tool se precise dots aur small circles easily banaye ja sakte hain jo intricate designs mein useful hote hain.

questions.question: Ombre nail design kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Ombre design mein ek color se dusre color mein smooth gradient transition hota hai jo stylish look deta hai.

questions.question: Marbling technique nail art mein kya hota hai?

options.B: Water mein colors ko swirl karke pattern banana

questions.explanation: Marbling mein water mein nail polish ko swirl karke unique marble-like patterns banaye jate hain.

questions.question: 3D nail art ke liye kaun se materials use hote hain?
questions.explanation: 3D nail art mein acrylic, gel, rhinestones, aur various embellishments use hote hain dimensional effects ke liye.

questions.question: Glitter application ke liye best method kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Glitter ko sticky base par apply karna chahiye aur brush se carefully place karna chahiye neat finish ke liye.

questions.question: French manicure design ke liye tip color kaisa hona chahiye?
questions.explanation: French manicure mein white ya nude tip traditional aur classic look deta hai jo professional hota hai.

questions.question: Nail art brush ke sizes kaun kaun se hote hain?
questions.explanation: Nail art brushes different sizes mein available hote hain (00 se 8) jo different design details ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: Foil nail design ke liye kya requirement hota hai?
questions.explanation: Foil design mein colored foil sheets ko special adhesive se nail par apply kiya jata hai metallic effect ke liye.

questions.question: Negative space nail design kya hota hai?

options.B: Nail ke parts ko unpainted rakhna aur design banalna

questions.explanation: Negative space design mein nail ke kuch parts ko unpainted rakhke creative aur modern look banaya jata hai.

questions.question: Geometric nail designs banane ke liye kya tools helpful hote hain?
questions.explanation: Geometric designs ke liye tape, stencils, stamps sabhi tools helpful hote hain precise patterns ke liye.

questions.question: Rhinestone aur crystal ko nail par attach karne ka best way kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Sticky gel base best hota hai rhinestones ko securely attach karne ke liye aur long-lasting hota hai.

questions.question: Watercolor nail art technique kya hota hai?

options.B: Water ke saath diluted polish use karke soft blend banana

questions.explanation: Watercolor technique mein diluted polish ko water ke saath blend karke soft, artistic look banaya jata hai.

questions.question: Cat eye nail design ke liye kya special ingredient use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Cat eye design ke liye magnetic gel polish use hota hai jo magnet ke saath line pattern banata hai.

questions.question: Nail art design apply karte waqt base coat ka importance kya hota hai?

options.B: Design ko protect karta hai aur adhesion improve karta hai

questions.explanation: Base coat design ko protect karta hai, nail ko damage se bachata hai, aur better adhesion provide karta hai.

questions.question: Seasonal nail art designs kaunse hote hain?
questions.explanation: Seasonal designs har season aur festival ke according different hote hain jo client preference par depend karte hain.

questions.question: Client consultation ke liye sabse important step kya hota hai?

options.B: Client ki needs aur expectations samajhna

questions.explanation: Client consultation mein client ki needs, preferences, aur expectations properly samajhna zaroori hota hai.

questions.question: Client ke saath communication mein kaun se points important hote hain?
questions.explanation: Good communication ke liye active listening, clear explanation, aur professional behavior sabhi important hote hain.

questions.question: Nail salon ke liye hygiene standards kya hone chahiye?
questions.explanation: Salon hygiene standards mein clean workspace, sterilized tools, aur proper ventilation sabhi zaroori hote hain.

questions.question: Client record maintain karne ke liye kya information important hota hai?
questions.explanation: Client record mein personal info, allergies, previous services, preferences, aur payment history sabhi maintain karna chahiye.

questions.question: Appointment scheduling system ke liye best practice kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Digital booking system efficient, organized, aur customer-friendly hota hai jo time management improve karta hai.

questions.question: Client ko service cost ke baare mein kab batana chahiye?
questions.explanation: Cost consultation mein hi clearly batana chahiye taaki client ko koi surprise na ho aur transparency rahe.

questions.question: Salon mein professional environment banane ke liye kya zaroori hota hai?
questions.explanation: Professional environment ke liye good ambiance, cleanliness, friendly staff, comfortable seating sabhi important hote hain.

questions.question: Client follow-up ke liye best timing kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: 1 week baad follow-up karna chahiye taaki client satisfaction check ho sake aur next appointment book ho sake.

questions.question: Difficult client ko handle karne ka best way kya hota hai?

options.B: Calm aur professional rahe, concern sunna

questions.explanation: Difficult client ko handle karte waqt calm rahe, unki concern sunna, aur professional approach maintain karna chahiye.

questions.question: Salon staff training ke liye kaun se topics important hote hain?
questions.explanation: Staff training mein technical skills, hygiene, customer service, communication, aur product knowledge sabhi important hote hain.

questions.question: Client feedback system kyo important hota hai?

options.A: Service quality improve karne ke liye
options.B: Client satisfaction measure karne ke liye
options.C: Staff performance evaluate karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Client feedback system service quality, satisfaction, aur staff performance sabhi aspects improve karne mein helpful hota hai.

questions.question: Salon pricing strategy ke liye kya factors consider karne chahiye?
questions.explanation: Pricing strategy mein service type, time, market rates, technician experience, aur overhead costs sabhi factors consider karne chahiye.

questions.question: Client retention ke liye best strategy kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Client retention mein quality service, loyalty programs, regular follow-up, aur good communication sabhi important hote hain.

questions.question: Salon ke liye inventory management kyo important hota hai?

options.B: Product availability ensure karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Inventory management cost control, product availability, wastage reduction, aur efficient operation ke liye important hota hai.

questions.question: Social media ko salon marketing ke liye kaise use kiya ja sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Social media mein before-after photos, testimonials, special offers, aur engagement sabhi salon marketing ke liye helpful hote hain.

questions.question: Client confidentiality aur privacy kyo important hota hai?
questions.explanation: Client confidentiality trust, legal requirement, aur professional ethics sabhi aspects important hote hain.

questions.question: Salon mein emergency situation ko handle karne ke liye kya preparation zaroori hota hai?
questions.explanation: Emergency preparedness mein first aid kit, staff training, emergency contacts, aur proper procedures sabhi zaroori hote hain.

questions.question: Nail extension mein bubbles form hone ka main reason kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Bubbles form hone ke multiple reasons ho sakte hain - improper prep, wrong ratio, air pockets, ya application technique.

questions.question: Nail extension mein lifting problem ko kaise solve kiya ja sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Lifting solve karne ke liye proper prep, correct sizing, good adhesive, aur right application technique sabhi zaroori hote hain.

questions.question: Acrylic nails mein yellowing issue ko kaise prevent kiya ja sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Yellowing prevent karne ke liye quality products, good topcoat, UV protection, aur proper care sabhi important hote hain.

questions.question: Client ko allergic reaction hone par kya action lena chahiye?

options.B: Immediately service stop karna aur doctor ko suggest karna

questions.explanation: Allergic reaction mein immediately service stop karna chahiye aur client ko medical help lene ke liye suggest karna chahiye.

questions.question: Nail breakage ko prevent karne ke liye kya precautions lene chahiye?

options.A: Proper length aur thickness maintain karna

questions.explanation: Nail breakage prevent karne ke liye proper length, thickness, moisturizing, aur careful handling sabhi important hote hain.

questions.question: Nail technician ke liye professional ethics mein kya include hota hai?
questions.explanation: Professional ethics mein honesty, transparency, client respect, confidentiality, aur quality commitment sabhi zaroori hote hain.

questions.question: Nail infection ka risk reduce karne ke liye kya best practice hota hai?
questions.explanation: Infection risk reduce karne ke liye proper sterilization, good hygiene, aur cross-contamination prevention sabhi zaroori hote hain.

questions.question: Technician ke liye occupational health risks kya hote hain?
questions.explanation: Occupational health risks mein respiratory issues, repetitive strain, skin problems, aur chemical exposure sabhi hote hain.

questions.question: Nail art design mein color combination choose karte waqt kya consider karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Color combination choose karte waqt skin tone, preference, occasion, season, aur trends sabhi factors important hote hain.

questions.question: Nail extension removal process mein client ko side effects se kaise bachaya ja sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Safe removal ke liye proper soaking, gentle handling, aur detailed post-removal care instructions sabhi important hote hain.

questions.question: Client ko false information dena kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: False information dena unethical aur unprofessional hota hai jo client trust ko damage karta hai aur bad reputation banata hai.

questions.question: Nail care aur maintenance ke baare mein client ko kya guidance deni chahiye?
questions.explanation: Client guidance mein moisturizing, water protection, healthy habits, aur regular care instructions sabhi include karne chahiye.

questions.question: Nail extension removal ke baad nail ko recover karne mein kitna time lag sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Complete recovery mein 1-3 months lag sakta hai depending on damage extent aur proper care par.

questions.question: Nail technician ke liye continuous learning kyo important hota hai?

options.B: Latest trends follow karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Continuous learning new techniques, trends, aur professional development ke liye zaroori hota hai career growth ke liye.

questions.question: Nail technician ke liye best career development strategy kya hota hai?

options.B: Workshops aur seminars mein participate karna

questions.explanation: Career development mein certifications, workshops, mentoring, aur continuous practice sabhi important hote hain.
